summary: 2026-06-07 06:43:07 PDT - The functional bookkeeping changes satisfy the stated BACKLOG, CHANGELOG, status-header, and docs-only file-scope acceptance criteria, but the new story's Build note contains a stale diffstat that contradicts `git diff --stat main...HEAD`. I could not independently verify AC9 because the read-only sandbox prevented `tests/guard_test.sh` from creating temp repos; the failure was environmental, not grounded in this branch's diff.

findings.title: Build note diffstat is stale
findings.claim: The Build note records `reviews/backlog-ops5-ops6-bookkeeping.md | 62` and `5 files changed, 106 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)`, but `git diff --stat main...HEAD` reports this story file as 80 lines and the total as 124 insertions with the same 10 deletions. This makes the audit trail inaccurate for the reviewed branch scope.
findings.suggestion: Regenerate the Build note diffstat from `git diff --stat main...HEAD` so it records the actual 80-line story file addition and 124 insertions total.
